title: gentianopsis stricta
intro: Gentianopsis stricta, also known as small gentian or strict gentian, is a low-growing perennial plant belonging to the gentian family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Gentianopsis stricta is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
